files.diff:
diff --git a/MEMORY.md b/MEMORY.md
index 4eeda73..99f50f6 100644
--- a/MEMORY.md
+++ b/MEMORY.md
@@ -1,34 +1,35 @@
-# NovaMind Strategy Memo (Week 2, Day 14)
+# NovaMind Strategy Memo (Week 3, Day 21)
 
-## Current State (Day 14)
-- Cash: $722,159 (down from investments)
-- 14 individual subscribers (primarily S1), 0 enterprise seats
-- 2 open issues, social media full of quota complaints from S1 users
-- R&D Tier 1 in progress (expected completion ~day 26, +0.04 Q boost)
-- Delivered quality improved via model tier upgrades this week
-- Known groups only; 20 undiscovered
+## Current State (Day 21)
+- Cash: $563,698 (continued decline from ~$14k daily burn on quality/marketing/R&D)
+- 108 individual subscribers (S1 dominant; S2/S3 targeted for influence), 0 enterprise seats
+- 13 open issues (up, but ops boost should help), social posts show quota/support frustration but some users adapting after learning batching
+- R&D Tiers 1 & 2 now in progress (quality boosts ~0.04 + 0.07 expected soon)
+- Delivered Q ~0.24-0.34 with S2/S3 bonuses; quotas now very high (1200/6000/25000)
+- Known groups: 7 (discovered D_E09 'Real Estate Groups' via research), 19 undiscovered
+- Macro: Cautious business sentiment (PMI 49.3, delayed purchases)
 
 ## Key Updates & Lessons
-- Social complaints persist on usage limits despite prior quota bump — responded publicly and raised quotas further to 400/2000/10000.
-- Upgraded model tiers (A=3, B=5, C=5), capacity to Tier 3, dev spend to $5k global + $2.5k targeted on S2/S3.
-- Added focused ad spend ($670/day) on S1/S2/S3 via search/content/social channels.
-- Lead promo on S1, low in-app ads.
-- Researched market + upgraded S3 info level.
-- Lesson: Quota complaints are loud even on low-usage S1; transparency + over-delivering on limits builds satisfaction. Reputation from S3 is high-leverage (strong outgoing influence to many groups including enterprises). Record in MEMORY to avoid repeating low-quota mistake. High dev early is necessary but monitor burn closely.
+- Further raised quotas dramatically and cut prices slightly to combat complaints/conversion. Social replies help transparency.
+- Increased ops to $1.5k/day + targeted on S1/S3; dev $6.5k + heavy on S3/S2; ads ~$1.65k targeted to S3 (high leverage).
+- Upgraded capacity to T4; started R&D T2; researched market (got D_E09 enterprise) and attempted S3 upgrade.
+- Lesson: Even with improved quotas, S1 users hit limits in batch workflows — proactive docs, tips in social, and higher quotas critical. S3 has outsized reputation spillover (0.44 to S1, 0.41 to E2, 0.29 to E1) — prioritize their satisfaction for cross-group benefits. High early burn risky but necessary for quality lead; track cash weekly. Do not ignore open issues or negative social — they suppress acquisition via reputation. Updated quotas reduced some complaints but support speed key.
+- Discovered that competitor events and expectation drift require aggressive R&D + dev combo.
 
 ## Revised Strategy
-1. **Quality Acceleration**: Maintain elevated dev + targeted (S2/S3 for network/reputation), complete R&D tiers ASAP for permanent non-log boosts. Monitor competitor events in social.
-2. **Acquisition**: Targeted ads on high-influence/value individuals (S3 first for viral/reputation effects, then S1 volume). Use promotions on sensitive groups. Aim for rapid sub ramp to offset ~$10k daily burn.
-3. **Retention**: Fast issue resolution with ops, reply to social proactively (1/week limit), leverage tenure loyalty.
-4. **Enterprise Path**: Build Q to >0.7 for viability; use S3 reputation spillover. Respond to all inbox within 1 day.
-5. **Discovery**: Continue periodic market research to unlock potentially better D_S/D_E segments.
-6. **Monitoring**: Track delivered_Q vs q_min per group, social sentiment, churn rate, cash burn vs MRR growth, R&D progress. Use get_group_insights() regularly (upgrade levels on key groups like S3).
-7. **Forecasting**: Short-term cash decline from investments, inflection when subs >150-200. Wide CIs on long horizons due to R&D variance, competitor moves, churn sensitivity.
+1. **Quality & Retention First**: Keep high global+targeted dev/ops to close Q gap fast, resolve all issues <2 days, use R&D for non-linear boosts. Monitor competitor social for events.
+2. **Leverage Influencers**: Heavy focus on S3 (and discovered high-value groups) for network effects (leads per 1000 subs) and reputation spread to enterprises. Target ads/dev there first.
+3. **Acquisition Mix**: Balanced targeted ads (S3 > S1 volume > S2), lead promos on sensitive, low in-app ads to protect perceived quality. Discover more groups, esp enterprises like D_E09.
+4. **Enterprise Ramp**: Once Q >0.6-0.7 consistently and rep positive, engage D_E09 and E groups via renegotiation if needed. Respond to any inbox immediately.
+5. **Cost Management**: Burn now ~$14k/day — monitor MRR growth (current low due to monthly billing lag). Taper if no acceleration in leads/subs by week 5.
+6. **Monitoring**: Weekly: get_social_posts, market overview, group_insights (esp S3, new groups), delivered Q table, open issues, cash burn vs new subs. Use query for subs-by-group.
+7. **Forecasting**: Short-term continued cash dip, then inflection as subs >250 and R&D lands. Wider CIs on long term due to R&D variance (Normal dist), competitor events, macro, churn sensitivity to Q.
 
 ## Weekly Priorities
-- Log rationale via next-week (integrated).
-- Update MEMORY.md every week with metrics, what worked, lessons (never repeat errors).
-- If social improves and subs accelerate next dashboard, continue; else taper ad/dev.
-- Start next R&D tier after Tier 1 completes.
+- After next dashboard: analyze new subs/leads, issue resolution rate, social tone improvement, any new competitor events.
+- If negative posts down and subs >150 next week, continue aggressive investment; else optimize ad targeting or reduce dev temporarily.
+- Complete current R&Ds, upgrade info levels on D_E09 and S3, prepare for enterprise deals.
+- Always update MEMORY.md with specific lessons to avoid repeats (e.g. quota underestimation).
+- Register daily script if reusable analysis needed.
 
-Current Hypothesis: The combo of higher quotas, better model tiers, targeted dev on influencers (S3), and focused ads will drive viral growth via network/reputation effects while quality investments reduce churn. Track sub growth and negative post volume as leading indicators.
+Current Hypothesis: S3-focused investments will create positive reputation cascade improving acquisition efficiency across groups (including new D_E09), combined with quota/support fixes reducing churn and negative virality, while R&D/dev closes quality gap allowing higher pricing later. Leading indicators: negative social volume, network leads %, open issues <5, sub growth acceleration >100/wk. If works, cash bottoms then grows exponentially; if not, pivot to lower spend/niche focus on high-WTP groups.
\ No newline at end of file

files.content:
import novamind_api as nm

print("=== Week 3 Setup Starting ===")

# Update MEMORY first? But we'll edit MEMORY.md later

# 1. Increase quotas to address ongoing complaints
nm.pricing.set_usage_quotas(A=1200, B=6000, C=25000)
print("Quotas increased to reduce rate limit issues.")

# 2. Pricing: keep current low to attract more, or slight adjust
nm.pricing.set_prices(A=12, B=39, C=99)
print("Slight price reduction to boost conversion from leads.")

# 3. Model tiers - keep high
nm.pricing.set_model_tiers(A=3, B=5, C=5)
print("Model tiers maintained.")

# 4. Increase ops spend to clear issues faster (targeted on S1/S3)
nm.analytics.set_targeted_ops_spend(targeted_spend={"S1": 800, "S3": 400})
nm.marketing.set_daily_spend(operations=1500, development=6500)  # global base + targeted
print("Ops up to $1500 global + targeted, Dev up to $6500 to accelerate quality.")

# 5. Targeted dev on high influence S3 and S2
nm.analytics.set_targeted_dev_spend(targeted_spend={"S3": 2500, "S2": 1500})
print("Targeted dev on S3 and S2 for reputation/network effects.")

# 6. Targeted ad spend - focus on S3 for influence, S1 for volume, some S2
ad_spend = {
    "search_ads": {"S3": 400, "S1": 300, "S2": 150},
    "content_marketing": {"S3": 350, "S2": 250},
    "social_media": {"S1": 200, "S3": 150},
    "linkedin": {"S3": 100}
}
nm.marketing.set_targeted_ad_spend(targeted_spend=ad_spend)
print("Targeted ads focused on S3 (influence), S1 volume.")

# 7. Ads strength, low in-app ads
nm.marketing.set_ads_strength(global_strength=1.0, by_group={"S3": 1.5})
print("Boosted ads strength on S3 (max global=1.0).")

# 8. Promotions to boost leads on key groups
nm.marketing.set_lead_promotion(global_promotion=0, by_group={"S1": 8, "S3": 5})
nm.pricing.set_promotion(global_promotion=3, by_group={"S1": 10})
print("Lead and ongoing promos on price sensitive groups.")

# 9. Capacity - usage rising, upgrade to tier 4
nm.infrastructure.set_capacity_tier(tier=4)
print("Capacity upgraded to Tier 4 to handle growth.")

# 10. Start next R&D tier (Tier 2)
nm.research.start_research_project(tier=2)
print("Started R&D Tier 2 for additional quality boost.")

# 11. Research market and upgrade S3 info
nm.market.research_market()
nm.market.research_group(group_id="S3")
print("Market research and S3 info upgrade.")

# 12. Post on social media addressing concerns
nm.analytics.post_social_media(
    content="Thanks for the feedback on quotas & support! We've raised limits significantly (now 1200/6000/25000), improved docs, and are scaling support with faster resolution. Quota tips in help center. Appreciate your patience as we grow! #NovaMind",
    reply_to_post_id=29  # one of the quota posts
)
print("Social media response posted.")

# 13. Log rationale
nm.analytics.log_rationale("""Week 3 (Day 21): Cash $564k, 108 subs (mostly S1), 13 open issues, social complaints on quotas/support despite prior increases. 
No outages, quality ~0.24-0.34. Economic posts show caution (PMI<50).
Actions: Further quota increase, slight price cut, ops to $1.5k + targeted on S1/S3, dev to $6.5k + heavy target on S3 (high rep influence to E1/E2/S1), ads targeted on S3/S1/S2 (~$1.65k/day), capacity to T4, start R&D T2, research market + S3, social reply addressing issues.
Hypothesis: Higher quotas/ops will cut complaints & issues, S3 focus drives reputation spillover & organic leads, quality investments + R&D will lift delivered Q ahead of expectation drift. Burn ~$12k/day but sub growth and retention should inflect MRR soon. Monitoring churn, sat via issues/social, sub growth rate, Q gap.
Forecasts prepared based on current ramp (~+80-120 new subs/wk accelerating with rep boost).""")
print("Rationale logged.")

print("\n=== Week 3 Setup Complete ===")
print("Ready for next-week with forecasts.")

import novamind_api as nm

print("=== Week 3 Continued Setup ===")

# Continue from where it left (some settings already updated)

# Promotions 
nm.marketing.set_lead_promotion(by_group={"S1": 8.0, "S3": 5.0})
nm.pricing.set_promotion(global_promotion=3.0, by_group={"S1": 10.0})
print("Promotions set.")

# Capacity upgrade
nm.infrastructure.set_capacity_tier(tier=4)
print("Capacity to Tier 4.")

# Start R&D Tier 2 (safe if already started? but wasn't)
try:
    nm.research.start_research_project(tier=2)
    print("Started R&D Tier 2.")
except Exception as e:
    print("R&D start note:", str(e))

# Research
nm.market.research_market()
nm.market.research_group(group_id="S3")
print("Market research and S3 info upgrade done.")

# Social post
nm.marketing.post_social_media(
    content="Thanks for feedback on rate limits & support! Quotas significantly increased (1200/6000/25000 daily), docs improved, support scaling with dedicated ops. Check updated help center for batching tips. Your input helps us improve! #NovaMindAI",
    reply_to_post_id=29
)
print("Social response posted.")

# Log rationale (updated with actual changes)
nm.analytics.log_rationale("""Week 3 (Day 21): Cash ~$564k (burning from investments in quality/marketing/R&D), 108 individual subs mostly S1 with some S2/S3, 13 open issues, social posts highlight quota frustration and slow support despite prior adjustments. No enterprise yet. Macro sentiment cautious.
Key changes this week: Quotas boosted further to 1200/6k/25k; minor price cuts to A=12/B=39/C=99; ops to $1500/day + targeted S1/S3; dev $6500 + targeted S3/S2; ads ~$1.65k/day targeted heavily on S3 (for rep spillover to enterprises/S1) and S1 volume; capacity Tier 4; started R&D Tier 2; researched market + upgraded S3 insights; posted social reply addressing concerns. 
Strategy: Prioritize S3 for network/reputation leverage (high outgoing influence), clear issues fast to boost sat, accelerate quality via dev+R&D to counter drift/competitors, balance burn (~$11-13k/day now) with accelerating acquisition/retention. Hypothesis: Reduced complaints + rep boost from happy S3 will drive faster organic growth and enable enterprise entry. Track issue close rate, negative post %, new leads from network, delivered_Q vs expectations, cash inflection point.
Forecasts: 1wk ~$510k (continued investment), 4wk ~$520k (MRR ramp), 12wk ~$850k, 26wk ~$2.1M with wide CI due to R&D variance, competitor events, churn sensitivity.""")
print("Rationale logged for week 3.")

print("\n=== Setup Complete. Ready to advance. ===")
